text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As I pass by the gym, I see Satono<n>Diamond and
Kitasan Black arguing<n>about something.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Don't do it, Dia! It's not safe!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: There's nothing to fret about! I'll be<n>fine!
choice_data_list: What seems to be the problem?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank goodness you're here!<n>Please, you
have to help me stop her!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
They tell me how the gym's treadmill<n>has a
"lunatic" setting that's so<n>difficult, nobody has
managed to<n>conquer it.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond, brimming with<n>unbridled
curiosity, is apparently<n>determined to be the first
one to do it.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
If no Umamusume has ever been able<n>to run on
that speed, that must mean<n>it's extremely
dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Kita, please don't try to stop me. You<n>know how I
am.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
It's no fun to draw conclusions on<n>something
before trying it out.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I won't fail this endeavor! I swear it!
choice_data_list: Let's see how fast it really is first.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, thank you. I appreciate your<n>words of
encouragement.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I know I can do it. Just watch and<n>see.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She sets the speed to lunatic, and the<n>machine
starts emitting a high-pitched<n>zipping noise as the
belt starts<n>spinning at blinding speed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So this is how fast it is... I can't wait<n>to try this!
Here I go!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Dia, nooo! Don't do it! It's too<n>dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We somehow manage to stop the<n>
overenthusiastic Satono Diamond<n>before she
does something reckless.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... Fine. Seeing as a trainer is<n>the one
suggesting caution, I suppose<n>this does require
prior investigation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She sets the speed to lunatic, and the<n>machine
starts emitting a high-pitched<n>zipping noise as the
belt starts<n>spinning at blinding speed!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I told you, Dia! It's too dangerous!<n>You can't
start running at that speed<n>without any
preparation!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're right... Then I'll simply<n>have to work
my way up to it!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'll start with the exercise bike on the<n>highest
"catastrophe" difficulty!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
N-noooo! No one's been able to do<n>that one
either!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We somehow manage to stop the<n>
overenthusiastic Satono Diamond<n>before she
does something reckless.
